requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety and Performance Rating — IRAM / IEC 60034-1
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全与性能额定——IRAM / IEC 60034-1
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全與性能額定——IRAM / IEC 60034-1

summary.en: Industrial AC motors sold in Argentina must comply with the IRAM certification scheme, which adopts IEC 60034-1 for ratings and performance requirements including insulation class, temperature rise, duty cycle, and mechanical protection (IP class). IRAM 62404 aligns with IEC 60034 principles. Safety requirements include protection against electric shock, insulation integrity, thermal performance under rated conditions, and IP protection class declaration. INTI laboratories conduct conformity testing against the applicable IRAM standard. An IRAM product certificate or Certificado de Homologación is required before market placement. There is no separate low-voltage directive equivalent in Argentina — electrical safety is addressed within the IRAM certification framework.
summary.zh: 在阿根廷销售的工业交流电机须符合IRAM认证方案，该方案采用IEC 60034-1规范额定值和性能要求，包括绝缘等级、温升、工作制及机械防护（IP等级）。IRAM 62404与IEC 60034原则对齐。安全要求包括防触电保护、绝缘完整性、额定条件下的热性能及IP防护等级声明。INTI实验室依据适用IRAM标准进行合格测试。在投放市场前须持有IRAM产品证书或Certificado de Homologación。阿根廷没有单独的低压指令等效规定——电气安全在IRAM认证框架内处理。
summary.zht: 在阿根廷銷售的工業交流電機須符合IRAM認證方案，該方案採用IEC 60034-1規範額定值和性能要求，包括絕緣等級、溫升、工作制及機械防護（IP等級）。IRAM 62404與IEC 60034原則對齊。安全要求包括防觸電保護、絕緣完整性、額定條件下的熱性能及IP防護等級聲明。INTI實驗室依據適用IRAM標準進行合格測試。在投放市場前須持有IRAM產品證書或Certificado de Homologación。阿根廷沒有單獨的低壓指令等效規定——電氣安全在IRAM認證框架內處理。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60034-1 (rotating electrical machines — rating and performance)
INTI accredited testing for IRAM certification

summary.en: In China, industrial motors are governed by GB 755-2019 (equivalent to IEC 60034-1) for ratings and performance including insulation class, temperature rise, and IP protection. GB/T 4942-2021 (aligned with IEC 60034-5) covers IP protection. GB 12665 covers motor cooling. The technical content of GB 755-2019 is largely equivalent to IEC 60034-1, meaning motors tested to GB 755 will typically be close to IEC 60034-1 benchmarks. However, Chinese certification documents are not automatically accepted by INTI or IRAM — separate IRAM certification is required.
summary.zh: 在中国，工业电机受GB 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1）规范额定值和性能，包括绝缘等级、温升和IP防护。GB/T 4942-2021（与IEC 60034-5对应）涵盖IP防护。GB 12665涵盖电机冷却。GB 755-2019的技术内容与IEC 60034-1基本等同，按GB 755测试的电机通常接近IEC 60034-1基准。但中国认证文件不被INTI或IRAM自动接受——须单独进行IRAM认证。
summary.zht: 在中國，工業電機受GB 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1）規範額定值和性能，包括絕緣等級、溫升和IP防護。GB/T 4942-2021（與IEC 60034-5對應）涵蓋IP防護。GB 12665涵蓋電機冷卻。GB 755-2019的技術內容與IEC 60034-1基本等同，按GB 755測試的電機通常接近IEC 60034-1基準。但中國認證文件不被INTI或IRAM自動接受——須單獨進行IRAM認證。

standards_or_laws: GB 755-2019 (旋转电机 额定值和性能, equivalent to IEC 60034-1)
GB/T 4942-2021 (IP protection for rotating machines, aligned with IEC 60034-5)

gap.en: The technical content of Chinese GB 755-2019 and Argentine IRAM 62404 (IEC 60034-1 basis) are largely aligned, reducing the underlying safety and performance gap. The main gap is procedural: Argentine market entry requires IRAM certification with INTI testing, whereas Chinese domestic compliance is via self-declaration against GB 755. Chinese GB 755 test reports and IP protection data (GB/T 4942) may be submitted as supporting technical evidence for INTI assessment, potentially accelerating the IRAM certification process, but they cannot substitute for the formal IRAM certification decision.
gap.zh: 中国GB 755-2019与阿根廷IRAM 62404（IEC 60034-1基础）的技术内容基本对齐，减少了基础安全和性能差距。主要差距在于程序：进入阿根廷市场需要经INTI检测的IRAM认证，而中国国内合规通过自我声明对照GB 755实现。中国GB 755测试报告和IP防护数据（GB/T 4942）可作为INTI评定的支持性技术证据提交，可能加快IRAM认证流程，但不能替代正式的IRAM认证决定。
gap.zht: 中國GB 755-2019與阿根廷IRAM 62404（IEC 60034-1基礎）的技術內容基本對齊，減少了基礎安全和性能差距。主要差距在於程序：進入阿根廷市場需要經INTI檢測的IRAM認證，而中國國內合規通過自我聲明對照GB 755實現。中國GB 755測試報告和IP防護數據（GB/T 4942）可作為INTI評定的支持性技術證據提交，可能加快IRAM認證流程，但不能替代正式的IRAM認證決定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — IRAM certification (INTI testing) covering IEC 60034-1 aligned safety and performance requirements; required before Argentine market placement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic sale — GB 755-2019 compliance required; no equivalent mandatory pre-market certification for export

source.publisher: IRAM — Instituto Argentino de Normalización y Certificación (IRAM 62404)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motors built to GB 755-2019 are technically close to IEC 60034-1 and therefore close to the IRAM 62404 safety and performance benchmarks. However, Argentine market entry requires formal IRAM certification with INTI testing — not just technical compliance. Chinese test reports may support but cannot replace the IRAM certification process. Exporters should engage an IRAM-authorised body and plan for INTI testing lead time. This is informational only and does not constitute legal or certification advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 按GB 755-2019制造的中国电机在技术上接近IEC 60034-1，因此接近IRAM 62404安全和性能基准。但进入阿根廷市场需要经INTI检测的正式IRAM认证——而不仅仅是技术合规。中国测试报告可支持但不能替代IRAM认证流程。出口商应委托IRAM授权机构，并预留INTI检测所需时间。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律或认证建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 按GB 755-2019製造的中國電機在技術上接近IEC 60034-1，因此接近IRAM 62404安全和性能基準。但進入阿根廷市場需要經INTI檢測的正式IRAM認證——而不僅僅是技術合規。中國測試報告可支持但不能替代IRAM認證流程。出口商應委託IRAM授權機構，並預留INTI檢測所需時間。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律或認證建議。

requirement_topic.en: IP Protection Class and Nameplate Requirements

summary.en: Motors certified under the IRAM scheme must declare and mark their IP (Ingress Protection) class in compliance with IEC 60034-5 as adopted by IRAM. The motor nameplate must display the rated voltage (380 V), frequency (50 Hz), power rating, efficiency class (IE code per IRAM 62404), IP class, insulation class, and other rated parameters in accordance with IRAM labelling requirements. Nameplate language and format should comply with Argentine requirements; the efficiency IE code must be displayed. INTI verifies nameplate compliance as part of the IRAM certification assessment.
summary.zh: 依据IRAM方案认证的电机须按IRAM采用的IEC 60034-5声明并标注IP（防护等级）等级。电机铭牌须按IRAM标识要求显示额定电压（380 V）、频率（50 Hz）、功率额定、效率等级（IRAM 62404 IE代码）、IP等级、绝缘等级及其他额定参数。铭牌语言和格式应符合阿根廷要求；须显示IE能效代码。INTI在IRAM认证评定中核查铭牌合规性。
summary.zht: 依據IRAM方案認證的電機須按IRAM採用的IEC 60034-5聲明並標注IP（防護等級）等級。電機銘牌須按IRAM標識要求顯示額定電壓（380 V）、頻率（50 Hz）、功率額定、效率等級（IRAM 62404 IE代碼）、IP等級、絕緣等級及其他額定參數。銘牌語言和格式應符合阿根廷要求；須顯示IE能效代碼。INTI在IRAM認證評定中核查銘牌合規性。

standards_or_laws: IRAM 62404 (nameplate and IE class marking requirements)

summary.en: Chinese motor nameplates follow GB 755-2019 requirements for display of rated voltage (380 V), frequency (50 Hz), power, insulation class, IP class (per GB/T 4942-2021), and efficiency grade (Grade 1/2/3 per GB 18613-2020). Chinese nameplates use GB efficiency grade notation (e.g. Grade 3) rather than IE code notation (e.g. IE3). IP class notation follows the IEC convention but declared under GB/T 4942. Nameplate parameters are broadly similar to IEC 60034-1 but may differ in format and notation from IRAM requirements.
summary.zh: 中国电机铭牌按GB 755-2019要求显示额定电压（380 V）、频率（50 Hz）、功率、绝缘等级、IP等级（依据GB/T 4942-2021）和能效等级（依据GB 18613-2020的1/2/3级）。中国铭牌使用GB能效等级标注（如3级）而非IE代码标注（如IE3）。IP等级标注遵循IEC惯例，但依据GB/T 4942声明。铭牌参数与IEC 60034-1基本相似，但格式和标注可能与IRAM要求有所不同。
summary.zht: 中國電機銘牌按GB 755-2019要求顯示額定電壓（380 V）、頻率（50 Hz）、功率、絕緣等級、IP等級（依據GB/T 4942-2021）和能效等級（依據GB 18613-2020的1/2/3級）。中國銘牌使用GB能效等級標注（如3級）而非IE代碼標注（如IE3）。IP等級標注遵循IEC慣例，但依據GB/T 4942聲明。銘牌參數與IEC 60034-1基本相似，但格式和標注可能與IRAM要求有所不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613-2020 (efficiency grade notation — Grade 1/2/3 rather than IE code)

gap.en: Chinese nameplates use GB efficiency grade notation (Grade 1/2/3) rather than IE code notation (IE3/IE4/IE5) as required by IRAM 62404. This notation difference may require nameplate updates for Argentine market compliance. Additionally, IRAM may require the nameplate to reference the IRAM certificate number and meet Argentine format requirements. IP class and other rated parameter data are technically aligned (both IEC-based), but the nameplate format and any Spanish-language declaration requirements should be verified with INTI or IRAM during the certification process.
gap.zh: 中国铭牌使用GB能效等级标注（1/2/3级）而非IRAM 62404要求的IE代码标注（IE3/IE4/IE5）。这一标注差异可能要求更新铭牌以符合阿根廷市场合规要求。此外，IRAM可能要求铭牌引用IRAM证书编号并满足阿根廷格式要求。IP等级和其他额定参数数据在技术上对齐（均基于IEC），但铭牌格式及任何西班牙语声明要求应在认证过程中向INTI或IRAM核实。
gap.zht: 中國銘牌使用GB能效等級標注（1/2/3級）而非IRAM 62404要求的IE代碼標注（IE3/IE4/IE5）。這一標注差異可能要求更新銘牌以符合阿根廷市場合規要求。此外，IRAM可能要求銘牌引用IRAM證書編號並滿足阿根廷格式要求。IP等級和其他額定參數數據在技術上對齊（均基於IEC），但銘牌格式及任何西班牙語聲明要求應在認證過程中向INTI或IRAM核實。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — IRAM-compliant nameplate required including IE code, IP class, voltage (380 V), frequency (50 Hz), and IRAM certificate reference; INTI verifies nameplate compliance during certification
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic sale — GB 755-2019 nameplate requirements; GB efficiency grade notation used (Grade 1/2/3) rather than IE code

source.publisher: INTI — Instituto Nacional de Tecnología Industrial

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motor nameplates using GB efficiency grade notation (Grade 1/2/3) will need to be updated to display the IE code (IE3/IE4 etc.) as required by IRAM 62404 for Argentine market compliance. IP class and other parameter data are technically aligned. Nameplate format requirements and any Spanish-language obligation should be confirmed with INTI or an IRAM-authorised body during the certification process. This is informational only and does not constitute legal or certification advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 使用GB能效等级标注（1/2/3级）的中国电机铭牌须更新，以显示IRAM 62404要求的IE代码（IE3/IE4等），方可符合阿根廷市场合规要求。IP等级和其他参数数据在技术上对齐。铭牌格式要求及任何西班牙语义务应在认证过程中向INTI或IRAM授权机构确认。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律或认证建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 使用GB能效等級標注（1/2/3級）的中國電機銘牌須更新，以顯示IRAM 62404要求的IE代碼（IE3/IE4等），方可符合阿根廷市場合規要求。IP等級和其他參數數據在技術上對齊。銘牌格式要求及任何西班牙語義務應在認證過程中向INTI或IRAM授權機構確認。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律或認證建議。
